title: Corrected Cross-Carrier q-Number Prediction of the Recoupling Angle
target: delta_phi(theta)=phi(theta)-phi(anchor), with phi=atan2(F21,F11) in a frozen SU(2)-matched sign gauge

transfer_protocol.metric: target normalized RMSE using target RMS amplitude

stopping_rule: One frozen evaluation only. No carrier replacement, predictor modification, interval change, target refit or threshold change after this commit.

claim_firewall.allowed_if_passed: The declared two-predictor q-number model transfers the recoupling-angle response between the two frozen carriers better than the equal-complexity smooth null.

evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
